summary: Full E2E testing of Aham Arogyam TCM Five-Element Quiz: backend API (11 pytest tests) + frontend flows (landing → quiz → result, admin login/dashboard, protected route). 100% backend pass; all critical frontend flows pass with one minor UX gap.

integration_issues.issue: On invalid credentials, user stays on /admin/login but NO visible error message/toast is rendered (no .error/[role=alert] node found). Users get no feedback that login failed.

action_items: Add a visible error/toast on AdminLogin when /api/auth/login returns 401 (currently silent failure).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — should migrate to FastAPI lifespan handler (non-blocking, but Starlette will deprecate).

CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec — browsers will reject credentialed requests. For this app credentials are not used (Bearer header), so currently functional, but should be tightened to explicit origin list.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env (acceptable for preview but should be rotated/generated for prod).
/api/quiz/submit is fully public with no rate-limit and stores arbitrary email/name — recommend basic rate limiting + length caps to prevent abuse.
Quiz.jsx is a 300+ line single file mixing 3 stages; consider extracting LeadForm/QuizStage/ResultStage into separate components for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (1 minor UX gap on login error)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_ prefixed quiz submissions via API tests; visible in admin dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_quiz_api.py — all green. Quiz E2E (lead form → 10 Qs → wa.me CTA), admin login, ProtectedRoute redirect, logout, token in localStorage all verified. Only follow-up: add inline error message on AdminLogin when login fails (silent today). Calendar interaction uses button[name='day'] selectors for react-day-picker.
rca of the issue: AdminLogin.jsx likely catches the 401 in try/catch but doesn't push to a toast or set local error state visible in DOM — verify error handling block in /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.jsx.
